sources.name: CDC PLACES — County (2025 release)
sources.license: CDC open data / U.S. Government work (public domain)
sources.role: Chronic burden, access, prevention, and social-need measures (model-based small-area estimates)

proposed_future_domains: CDC WONDER-validated explainable risk model with SHAP
caveats: PLACES values are model-based small-area estimates, not direct counts.
Age-adjusted prevalence preferred for cross-county comparability where available.
